scripts.start: concurrently --names "N0,N1,N2,N3,N4,N5" --prefix-colors "green,cyan,yellow,magenta,blue,red" --handle-input "npm run node0" "npm run node1" "npm run node2" "npm run node3" "npm run node4" "npm run node5"
scripts.kill3001: powershell -Command "$p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if ($p) { Write-Host 'Killing node on port 3001'; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force } else { Write-Host 'No process found on port 3001' }"
